query:
UPDATE v2_job_status SET flow_status = (
                    SELECT jsonb_set(
                        flow_status,
                        ARRAY['modules', (idx - 1)::text],
                        $2::jsonb
                    )
                    FROM jsonb_array_elements(flow_status->'modules')
                        WITH ORDINALITY arr(elem, idx)
                    WHERE elem->>'id' = $3
                    LIMIT 1
                ) WHERE id = $1 AND (
                    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(flow_status->'modules')
                        WITH ORDINALITY arr(elem, idx)
                    WHERE elem->>'id' = $3
                ) > 0
